[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Diskret Stahn''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. For a fee, he transported beings to their destinations in his small [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. He had traveled much of the galaxy, including the [[Abregado system/Legends|Abregado system]].

His ship came under attack by pirates while he was transporting dancer [[Pei Yi]] to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. His ship's engine was damaged in the attack, though he was able to land on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] for repairs and supplies. He was stranded on the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] with Yi for a long period of time.

While he was stranded, an entertaining [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] was there and decided to talk to him. He told him his story and also taught him this tune that was stuck in his head while he was in space. The spacer eventually turned the tune into a song: [[Calypso]]

==Behind the scenes==
Diskret Stahn appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
